text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since early childhood, Mejiro McQueen and
Mejiro Ryan have always gotten along well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them watch a G1 race together. They
observe the strong will of the racers on the track
and reflect on themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're reminded of the strength they will need to
truly take on the Classics.
